title: Notion Template Collection Student Developer Pack Offer
description: Notion and Github for Education are partnering together to bring the next generation of software to students around the world.
eligibility: Verified students aged 13 or older who are approved for the GitHub Student Developer Pack; provider restrictions may also apply.
value: From setting up your CS course dashboard to running your hackathons to building your portfolios — this collection of templates has got you covered, in the classroom and beyond.
